texto: One Christmas I had no money, and so I went home and just, like, wrote a poem; I mean, I didn't write them, but I just handed out poems as Christmas presents. Like, 'Here's a Pablo Neruda poem that really made me think of you.'
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a June Diane Raphael: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “One Christmas I had no money, and so I went home and just, like, wrote a poem; I mean, I didn't w…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, home, money pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de natal e money.

frase_original: One Christmas I had no money, and so I went home and just, like, wrote a poem; I mean, I didn't write them, but I just handed out poems as Christmas presents. Like, 'Here's a Pablo Neruda poem that really made me think of you.'
